title: GemCraft - Chasing Shadows

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon HD 7900 Series (TAHITI, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.5-gentoo, LLVM 8.0.0)

Steam Overlay does not work. 
Right clicking in game makes game lose input (Alt-tabbing in & out fixes this). Right clicking is not needed to play the game (functionality is the same when shift+clicking in game)
title: GemCraft - Chasing Shadows

notes: Right clicking prevents further mouse clicks from being recognized, alt-tabbing out and back fixes that, until the next right click. Maybe an issue specific to the xfce window manager?

title: GemCraft - Chasing Shadows

notes:
Generally the game works perfect, out of the box, idk if "Silver" applies really here.
No tweaks added, just launched with lastest proton beta (3.16.4b).
I play a session of 2 or 3 hours with no issues except one that described below.
I went to all menues, and lot of scenarios without any mayor issue.

Sometimes when on screen are lot of monsters that makes sounds, sound becomes glitchy, then when monsters become less in quantity returns to normal
title: GemCraft - Chasing Shadows

notes: runs without problems. performance not perfect.
